components.text:
The Physique Essence carries the distilled nature of another cultivator's body — their elemental alignment, compressed and transferable. I held one for three days before understanding what it was.
Five elements, five natures: Fire, Water, Wood, Metal, Earth. Each does not simply add power — it reshapes what the body understands itself to be. A Fire physique cultivator I once observed stood in a burning structure and breathed slowly. The fire did not touch him.
